segments.text: If you are currently holding your phone with two hands, you are OUT! Begone!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Hey! That is so unfair! They might have bad finger rizz!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Fine. Second chance ONLY if you Subscribe right now! GO!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 1: Avoid the trap! Name a commonly known fast-food restaurant.
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: 10 seconds! Lock it in!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said MCDONALD'S, you fell for the trap! You are out of the challenge!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Only survivors Like the video! Show me that engagement!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 2, trivia! What is Mr. Krabs' absolute favorite thing to count?
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Time is running out, ye bilge rats!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said MONEY, you are trapped! Of course, everyone said money!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Final Trap! Are you a fan of Squidward (A) or Plankton (B)? B wins!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Comment your final streak! Why did you choose B?
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Attention, simpletons. If you are currently sitting down, you are immediately eliminated. Stand up!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: But my legs feel kinda cooked! You can't just eliminate the sitters!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Subscribers get a reprieve. Only them. Now hurry up, I haven't got all day.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Round 1: We must say the same thing! Name a geometric shape.
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Think common, think obvious!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The target was SQUARE. If you didn't say SQUARE, you are out!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: If you survived that disaster, hit that Like button to solidify your position.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Round 2, lore check! We need the common answer! What does Plankton typically call his computer wife, Karen?
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Make your choice, before I do it for you!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The required answer was WIFE! If you said anything else, prepare for failure!
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Final Trap! Did Squidward move to Tentacle Acres (A) or stay in Bikini Bottom (B)? B wins!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Comment your streak! Tell me why you didn't pick A!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: If your phone battery is charged over 50%, you are too powerful and must be eliminated!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Oh, that's harsh! Being fully charged is the ultimate sigma move!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: I’ll allow a second chance ONLY if you smash that Subscribe button right now!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 1: Avoid the trap! Name a common household appliance used for cooking.
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: 10 seconds to think outside the box!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The trap answer was MICROWAVE! If you picked that easy choice, goodbye!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: If you survived the appliance war, Like the video right now to lock in your survival!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 2: SpongeBob trivia! What is the full official name of the driving school SpongeBob attends?
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Put your brains to work!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The trap answer was MRS. PUFF'S BOATING SCHOOL! If you were specific, you lose!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Final Trap! Do you prefer the 'Wet Painters' episode (A) or 'Band Geeks' (B)? B wins!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Comment your streak! Why is B the superior episode?
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: If you are wearing pants right now, your lack of originality removes you from the game.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: No cap, that rule is unfair! Everyone wears pants!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: A subscription will grant you a fleeting second chance. Use it wisely.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Round 1: Match my answer! Name a color associated with Patrick Star.
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Get the common one!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The target was PINK! If you said anything other than PINK, you are beneath me!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Like this video immediately. I need confirmation of your inferior intelligence.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Round 2, my time! We must match! What is the main ingredient of the Krabby Patty (not the secret one)?
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Make it quick, before I steal your ideas!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The correct answer was FISH. Anything else is a failure!
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Final Trap! Did Plankton successfully steal the Krabby Patty formula (A) or always fail (B)? B wins!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Comment your streak! Why is B the only true option?
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: If your first name starts with the letter S, you are too suspicious and you are OUT!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Woah! That's harsh! I bet I can make them stay!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Bet! Second chance granted only if you Subscribe right now! Quick!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 1: Avoid the obvious! Name a common breakfast food item.
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Time is running! Be different!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said PANCAKES, you are eliminated! Everyone loves pancakes!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Survivors, confirm your win! Like the video right now!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Round 2, SpongeBob lore! What is the name of the establishment where SpongeBob works?
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Hurry up before I charge ye for the time!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The trap answer was THE KRUSTY KRAB! Too easy, ye lose!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Final Trap! Should the next episode be Patrick-themed (A) or Sandy-themed (B)? A wins!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Comment your final streak! Why is A the better choice for the next episode?
segments.speaker: SpongeBob
